summary_one_line: An ICC profile whose pipeline produces two adjacent 3x3 matrix stages with NULL offsets, requiring profile-class/colorspace FOURCC literals at the header.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header whose device/profile-class FOURCC (offset 0x0c-0x0f) and colorspace tags (0x10-0x16) parse into a transform pipeline that yields two adjacent matrix stages, both with Offset==NULL and 3x3 channel dims, so _MultiplyMatrix reaches the matrix-merge guard at line 211. The winner reaches the line at all (T=13 vs L T=0); the false-side then fires because offsets are NULL/dims are 3x3.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winning vpc seeds carry diverse, well-formed profile-class FOURCCs at 0x0c-0x0f (prtr, scnr, lcms-class) and varied colorspace pairs (CMY/XYZ, RGB/Lab, MCH3/XYZ) at 0x10-0x16, building pipelines that survive to the matrix-multiply optimizer. The branch goes from never reached by the loser to T=13 hits, and the function entry-line proxy XFormSampler16 shows 107000 W hits vs 0 L hits.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser vp seeds are uniformly stuck at the mntr profile class (0x0c=6d 'm', 0x0d=6e 'n', flagged DIFFER) with a single fixed RGB/XYZ colorspace, never producing the dual-matrix-stage pipeline; the blocker line is reached on the false direction only (T=0 F=0 then T=0 F=10) and the matrix-merge path stays at 0 hits across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: vpc adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that vp lacks. I2SRandReplace splices logged ICC FOURCC comparison operands (the magic tag/profile-class strings the parser compares the header against) directly into the input bytes at the offsets where they are read, manufacturing valid profile-class/colorspace combinations that vp's distance-bucket feedback alone could not assemble byte-by-byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the matrix-offset/dimension guard inside _MultiplyMatrix, reached only after two adjacent matrix stages exist.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S technique delta.
Winner seeds carry diverse profile-class FOURCCs while losers are uniformly mntr at offsets 0x0c-0x0d.
Winners vary the colorspace tag field while losers keep one fixed value, showing dataflow into the pipeline-shape decision.
A winning seed contains a profile-class/colorspace FOURCC pair (scnr RGB Lab) consistent with reaching the matrix optimizer.
Loser seeds are uniformly the mntr/RGB/XYZ header that never reaches the matrix-merge path.
The blocker true side is reached by W (T=13) but never by L, and L hits only the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 211  T=13 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (m1->Offset != NULL || m2 ->Offset != NULL ||  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace, only havoc plus token mutators.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2217 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 10085a2784839154` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16 of the 17-level ancestor chain, the ParentInfo-only signature characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the matrix-merge guard is gated only on numeric matrix offsets/dimensions with no FOURCC/magic equality comparison upstream still shows vpc beating vp at this branch, which would show I2S operand substitution is not the enabling mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff shows winner FOURCC diversity but does not directly prove those bytes are the comparison operands I2SRandReplace substituted versus reached by havoc luck on the CMP_MAP gradient shared by both fuzzers.
